calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Andriot Energy, Inc. and James Backman.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Richard M. Kelly, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Egan Plumbing, Inc.
Anthony Egan, Ower of Egan Plumbing, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Adroit Energy, Inc. or James Backman.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on December 8, 2017 and served on January 18, 2018.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 12, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on April 27, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Egan Plumbing, Inc. and against the Defaulted Defendants Adroit Energy, Inc. and James Backman, as follows:

Damages - $67,138.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,084.84.
Attorney Fees - $5,000.00.
Costs - $1006.90.

Total - $85,229.74.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice And Motion Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Continued To Aug-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Continued To Sep-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
